negative_prompt: real readable text, photo of phone, hand holding phone, device frame, bezel, notch, cluttered elements, real brand logo, korean letters, chinese letters, japanese letters

system_presets.ios: iOS 19 style UI, rounded 12px corners, SF Pro-like sans-serif aesthetic, subtle hairline dividers, light system background, decorative sans-serif glyph placeholders
system_presets.android: Material 3 style UI, 16dp rounded corners, Roboto-like sans-serif aesthetic, accent color surfaces, elevation shadows soft, decorative sans-serif glyph placeholders
system_presets.web-mobile: responsive web UI adapted to mobile viewport, 8px rounded inputs, neutral sans-serif aesthetic, clean card stack, decorative sans-serif glyph placeholders
system_presets.kr-minimal: clean rounded card layout, soft beige or neutral background, subtle shadow, Pretendard-like sans-serif aesthetic, Korean fintech app UI style, decorative sans-serif glyph placeholders

screen_presets.login: single column, logo top, two input fields, CTA button, secondary link below
screen_presets.feed: vertical list of cards, thumbnail on left or top, subtle metadata row below title, sticky top bar
screen_presets.detail: hero media at top, title and metadata, action row, body content blocks, related section
screen_presets.settings: grouped list rows, icons on the left, chevrons on the right, section headers with small caps
screen_presets.onboarding: full-bleed illustration or gradient, large headline placeholder, short supporting line, primary CTA, pager dots
screen_presets.empty: centered illustration, short headline placeholder, one action button, generous negative space

mood_map.light: light neutral palette, soft shadows, airy composition
mood_map.dark: dark neutral palette, subtle glow, high contrast accents
mood_map.warm: warm neutral beige/cream palette, gentle shadows
mood_map.cold: cool neutral palette with blue-grey accents, crisp edges

density_map.loose: generous spacing, large tap targets, fewer elements per screen
density_map.compact: tighter spacing, denser information stacking, smaller tap targets
